STATEMENT OF NON-RECEIP5 OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER SIEBEL SYSTEMS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MOVING PARTY APPEARED. PETITIONER SIEBEL SYSTEMS, INC.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD -- A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,300. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Barbara Harris Chiang, Esq., Dillingham & Murphy, 415-397-2700, for petitioner and moving party Siebel Systems
No other appearances.
* PETITIONER SIEBEL SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award -- A Statement of non-opposition was filed. The court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner's Motion to confirm arbitration award is GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,300. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR # 7855, (JJM/301)
